fields.description: Item this minimum manufacturing rule applies to. The automation uses this to look up the per-item per-warehouse floor quantity.
fields.label: Item Code

fields.description: Warehouse whose stock is checked. Automation creates a Production Plan when stock in this warehouse falls below the projected threshold.
fields.label: Warehouse

fields.description: If the calculated shortage is less than this value, the Production Plan qty is raised to this minimum to avoid under-utilising production machines.
fields.label: Min Manufacturing Qty

fields.description: UOM for Min Manufacturing Qty. The automation converts this to the item's Stock UOM before comparing with the shortage quantity.
fields.label: UOM
